codeReview.summary: The gateway-bedrock-zai-host-credential-boundary feature is comprehensively implemented. The code adds a complete gateway service (internal/gateway) with: (1) IdentityRegistry for managing per-sandbox credentials with issuance, validation, revocation, rotation, and expiry; (2) HTTP handlers for /provider/v1/inference (sandbox Bearer auth → host-side provider call) and localhost-only credential management endpoints; (3) GatewayClient implementing provider.Provider for sandbox-to-gateway routing; (4) Proxy-level denial of all /provider/* routes with 403 to prevent browser bypass (VAL-GATEWAY-002); (5) Sanitized upstream provider errors that never leak credentials or auth headers (VAL-GATEWAY-007); (6) Unsupported provider rejection (VAL-GATEWAY-006). The implementation includes 35 gateway tests plus 2 proxy denial tests covering authentication flows, credential lifecycle, error sanitization, browser denial, and multi-sandbox isolation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker followed established patterns: Bearer token auth in Authorization header, localhost-only restriction for sensitive endpoints via isLocalhost() check, error sanitization via sanitizeError() helper, and SHA-256 hashing for credential storage. These patterns align with existing codebase conventions and AGENTS.md security guidelines.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: internal/gateway/handlers.go:229-253 (isLocalhost check), internal/gateway/handlers.go:299-322 (sanitizeError implementation), internal/gateway/config.go:89-114 (SHA-256 credential hashing)

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker followed the go-worker skill procedure: ran baseline validation (go test, vet, build), implemented backend-first with tests, then ran full validation suite. Handoff.skillFeedback confirms followedProcedure: true with no deviations.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker documented the gateway architecture in .factory/library/gateway-provider-boundary.md with clear invariants, route table, and future work items. This fills a knowledge gap about the host-side provider boundary that wasn't previously documented.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/gateway-provider-boundary.md contains architecture diagram, invariants list, route table, and files reference

summary: The gateway-bedrock-zai-host-credential-boundary feature passes review. Implementation fully covers all expected behaviors: authenticated sandbox callers via Bearer tokens, proxy-level browser denial at /provider/*, host-only credential injection, sanitized error responses, and stale credential invalidation via revocation/rotation. The 37 tests (35 gateway + 2 proxy) provide comprehensive coverage including auth success/denial, credential lifecycle, error sanitization, browser-like caller rejection, and multi-sandbox isolation. No blocking issues found. Library documentation was added for future workers.
